scripts.db:migrate: node -e "console.error('Prisma is not configured for apps/api yet: missing prisma/schema.prisma. Replace this placeholder when Prisma is introduced.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.db:seed: node -e "console.error('Prisma seed is not configured for apps/api yet: missing prisma schema and seed entrypoint. Replace this placeholder when Prisma is introduced.'); process.exit(1)"
